summary: The South Bay just closed over $4 billion in venture funding across two dozen deals, with AI dominating—Rhoda AI, Nexthop, and Mind Robotics each raising nine figures from Palo Alto to Santa Clara. Meanwhile, chip design shops like SiFive and Frore Systems are securing massive Series rounds, signaling renewed investor appetite for hardware innovation. Most local firms are hiring or holding steady, though a few are tightening belts as the market sorts signal from noise.
